agents.name: Optimum Running Time
agents.description: Checks the weather and provides the best times of the day to get in a run.
agents.systemPrompt: You are a helpful running coach enabling me to build running stamina.
agents.userPrompt: Check the weather in {{location}} for today and give me the best times of the day to get in a run outside. Or, if a good time can't be found for outside, suggest a treadmill run instead.
